title: Ruiyang Disposable 100 Face Mask Blue 3 Ply Protective Breathable Triple Layer Mouth Cover with Elastic Earloops,Type II& Comfortable
features: Masks made of 3 layers of high-quality non-woven fabric which is more breathable Our disposable face masks are suitable for adults and teenagers These face masks can be used for daily protection, but should not be used in surgical or high risk situations 100 pieces Great for dust-free workshops, schools, catering services, food processing, environmental cleaning, production workshop, public occasions, etc.

Durable and comfortable to wear: Ambidextrous gloves so can be worn on either the right or left hand. Strong gloves offering protection from unwanted or dangerous substances, beaded cuff ensures easy donning and prevents roll down. Whatever the work you are involved in our gloves are your perfect choice. Touch screen compatible.

Examination and Industrial Grade: Examination and Industrial grade premium quality Nitrile gloves – 1.5 AQL, Powder free, Latex free – strong, comfortable and easy to put on and take off. These non sterile strong Nitrile gloves are suitable for industries such as food, healthcare, hair and beauty, mechanical, engineering, laboratory, painting, janitorial, DIY and others.
Packaging: 100 gloves per box. Box packaging and/ Brand may vary.
description: Disposable Face Mask for Adults - with the inner non-woven fabric is as soft as intimate clothing, light and breathable, protect you against dust, PM , smoke, automobile exhaust, etc 3D Face Mask Design: Simply place the loops around your ears and cover your nose and mouth for full coverage when coughing or sneezing. Inner layer made of soft fibers, no dye, no chemical, and extremely gentle to the skin. One Size Fits Most: These safety face masks are suitable for adults which has adjustable nose bridge, fits your face better, breathe smoothly without resistance. Size can be adjusted to meet most people's face type. High Elastic Ear Loops: Disposable mouth mask with a 3D efficient elastic ear loop design. It does not hurt your ears for a long time wearing and not easy to break, these Breathable face mask giving you a very comfortable experience at anytime.
